Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 
10 
PGM_ID 
LABEL: 
Program Identifier (1=FFS Medicare; 2=FFS Medicaid; 3=Dual) 
DESCRIPTION: A constructed data element identifying the applicable CMS program of which the patient is a 
beneficiary. 
SHORT NAME: PGM_ID 
LONG NAME: PGM_ID 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Patient 
SOURCE: 
AHCAH facility-submitted data 
VALUES: 
1 = FFS
